title: umount: add all option to umount all mounted containers
body:
Umount all of the currently mounted containers.
After change:

```
➜  buildah git:(umount-all) sudo ./buildah umount --all
43e674866c4cb46dfc64988b95a8247d6ae5fd17f0b15a46f16a81cb62a55353
14d5fbebf8eadf8056f72271cff1e86147fe40990331c5bf76e251f3cdd25b81
07d02e23e58503a33ec1886c1bfd6e9831fe05c5ac2ea8c6d9e2a939cb40b9fc
```

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: LGTM. Can we get the same thing in podman umount as well.
@umohnani8 sounds like a good idea, I'll whip up a PR.
Nope, podman only umounts the one single container handed in.  Need to work through a compile issue, then the code should be ready.

:pushpin: Commit 9215156 has been approved by `rhatdan`
